headline: Dow Hits 21st All-Time Closing High in 2026: Buy These 3 Stocks
summary: Dow hits its 21st record close of 2026 as investors rotate into defensive blue chips, spotlighting GS, CAT and KO for their earnings growth potential.

headline: Worried Gold Is Overcrowded? 3 Stocks for Retirees to Consider Instead, Ranked
summary: Gold is up big and the trade is getting crowded, but piling in now may be the worst move a retiree makes. Three alternatives ranked by the criteria retirement portfolios actually demand could offer a smarter path to hard-asset protection.

headline: Why ResMed (RMD) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of medical device company ResMed (NYSE:RMD) jumped 3.7% in the afternoon session after it was added to Goldman Sachs' APAC Conviction List, signaling renewed confidence from the investment bank.
